string 2: Whoa...! We're back?
Was that all just a dream?{next}
A new anomaly...?{next}
Were there any hints in that movie?{next}

I'm not sure, but... I saw the same thing you did, so it
couldn't have been a dream, or even an illusion.

That movie talked about poison... You don't think it meant
the wine we delivered, do you?
Do you think Venusmon is—?
Hold on... Take a look at the ocean!
Not a drop of red in sight... I-It's back to normal?!
What in the world is going on here? Let's ask the Digimon.

Come to think of it... where's Lanamon? I think she should
know about this, too.

I thought I saw her getting into MasterBlimpmon just a
while ago...
Is it starting to move? W-Wait. If it takes off without us...
...We won't be able to get back! Let's hurry and get aboard!

It's like we're traveling on water, like a boat. Who launched
MasterBlimpmon? ...Was it Lanamon?
This... this is—!
What's wrong?
This is... poison! Highly lethal poison!
What?!
Wh-What could this mean...?!
I am loath to even conceive of it, but...
...I believe I have been deceived!
I guess the cat's out of the bag!
This can't be happening...
I mean...
...you've been so kind to us!
Oh, yeah. Sure, sure... Suuuper kind to you, I've been. After all...
...you guys are my precious patsies here.
You... duped me as well?
...Yep. It was all lies. The whole kit and caboodle.
Every word out of my mouth was a bunch of hogwash.

I'm a member of a less radical faction of Titans—ones who
find all this uncivilized fighting absolutely repugnant.

I'm just saying we should find ways to make our enemies 
capitulate without a battle.
Ways like this poison here!

Now that the jig is up, I can't exactly let you guys live,
now, can I?!
This is... poison! Highly lethal poison!
What?!
Wh-What's going on here?!
I am loath to even think of it, but...
...I believe I have been deceived!
I guess the cat's out of the bag!
This can't be happening...
I mean...
...you've been so kind to us!
Oh, yeah. Sure, sure... Suuuper kind to you, I've been. After all...
...you guys are my precious suckers.
You... lied to me as well?
...Yep. It was all lies. The whole kit and caboodle.
Every word out of my mouth was a bunch of hogwash.

Except I really am part of a moderate faction of Titans—the
part about me hating this uncivilized fighting wasn't a lie!

I'm just saying we should find ways to make our enemies 
capitulate without a battle.
Ways like this poison here!

Now that the jig is up, I can't exactly let you guys live, now,
can I?!
Damn it!
Enough of this, Lanamon!

Would you shut up, already? That goody-two-shoes
attitude of yours makes me sick to my stomach!

Our grudge... The Titans' grudge runs way deeper
than your pathetic kindness!

That damn Chronomon and his curse... It forced us
to flee to the ends of the digital world.

You can't even BEGIN to fathom the horrors we faced, all while
you lived happily, squandering the blessings of the Current!
And you better believe I'm going to give you a taste!
Lanamon mentioned the Titans bear a grudge...?{next}
Chronomon's curse? What's that about?{next}
What were the horrors they faced?{next}

It is said that the Titans once committed a grave sin... and
were punished accordingly.

Their ancestors tried to take control of Iliad, only to be
banished deep underground by the hero Chronomon.

The reason they want the Current so badly... is the sheer
dearth of resource in the lands they inhabit.
To think... Lanamon was one of them this whole time...
It would seem your words were true all along.
We're so happy you believe us now!

If you indeed have knowledge of the future, all the more
reason to act—
—and end this tragedy before it begins...!

I wonder where Lanamon planned on going with
MasterBlimpmon...

We gotta get to Neptunemon on the double! We're running
out of time!
True... MasterBlimpmon, please turn around.
STOP!
Who are you...?
Thank goodness we made it in time!
Thank goodness...
Huh, look at that.
Your look is clearly different, and yet...
...I recognized you the instant I saw you.
Yes... It's been a while, hasn't it?
Ever since that day... I lived for this moment...
...for the opportunity to speak the words I couldn't back then.
For all that you did for me—
NO, NO, NOOOOOOOOO!
Why did you have to get in the way?! I was so CLOSE...!

My plan was perfect! Flawless from start to finish—until
you poked your big, fat noses into it!

We trusted you... Why did you go through all that effort,
just to get close to us?

Power means everything to Titans. But if it came down to
strength alone, I could never make it to the top...

The first time anyone ever showed me any respect was
when I succeeded in tricking a human...

In the fight against humans eight years ago, I managed to
fool their leader!

All it took was a little talk of peace and harmony, and he
fell for it hook, line and sinker! Hee hee!
Their leader?

They called him "cap-ten," whatever that means. I called him
"chump"! Got the drop on him as soon as his guard was down!
A captain...? You mean...?
...Mr. Kuremi? The guy who worked with my dad?!

Tricking humans—THAT'S my reason for living! My triumph 
back then gave me this power I have now!
Hee hee hee...! MWAHAHAHAHA!
But what exactly are you trying to accomplish?!

Total conquest of the Abyss Area! You think controlling the
current alone will satisfy our hatred? Our anger?

Neptunemon was originally assigned that goal, but—for
some reason—kept putting it off...

It's just as our great Plutomon concluded. Neptunemon 
can't be trusted!

And that's where I come in. Plutomon sent me here on a
secret mission.
I'm here to destroy the entire Abyss Area—Neptunemon and all!

The reason I targeted you losers is... Well, because you're
human. Nothing more. Nothing less.

I earned my current standing and strength by tricking
humans. That was the biggest win of my life!

I used you suckers like the stepping stones you are. Why
would I stop now?!
MWAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!

Beating me won't do a thing... Our hatred, pain, and anger...
The Titan's grudge can't be extinguished...
That's how heavy... Chronomon's curse weighs... on our souls.
I must ask, one last time... Did you truly plan out all of this?

The words you spoke... that day that I healed your wounds...
I refuse to believe your gratitude was only a lie.

"I didn't... really want to fight. I had no choice... Those
were... just my orders."
Is that... what you want to hear?
I was born... a Titan. This... is my lot in life.

Without a show of strength... I could never rise out of the
muck. That's why I was jealous... your unselfish kindness...
And that one... is no lie...

What Lanamon said back there... You defied your orders...
for us?
Of course something like that would not go unpunished...
They even sent Lanamon to assassinate you!
The day all of you disappeared... I swore on this scarf.

I swore that, one day, I would say the words I could not
back then.
The life you saved that day... I swore not to waste it.
For all you did for me then... I thank you.
You have my heartfelt gratitude.
Venusmon conspired to take down the Titans from within...

But after she learned of Neptunemon's true identity, they
joined forces to drive back the Titans.

The pair vowed to work hand in hand to protect the seas
and its denizens.

The ocean would soon regain its previous brilliance, and its glorious depths
will once again become a source of happiness to all who reside in her waters.
Destiny has been altered. This is the power of the Akashic Vision...
We... changed the past?

Before Homeros fell asleep, they released the "Sacred Current,"
which grants the chosen one the power of the Current.

It was a precaution in case peril ever befell Iliad, and that
power has already been bestowed upon you. However...

...this power is at present bound by constraints. It's too
great for a single Digimon to bear alone, you see.

If you are to wield it, you must assemble like-minded allies.
The ones you saved just now are a start... Look there.

Those you save will in time become apostles of Iliad, and
your bonds will grow into a vessel for the Sacred Current.
...Huh?
Whoa! What the...?!
Aegiomon?!

A fraction of the restricted power of the Sacred Current
has now been freed.

Seek comrades willing to face destiny beside you. It's the
only way to stave off the collapse of the natural order.
Comrades...

I pray the higher being who governs this world watches over you. 
First... go and visit the comrade you have just saved.
